document_number.km: ៦១២ ប្រក.កសក

description: The community forest areas is established and put under management of Kep's District Forestry Administration​ in order to manage and preserve biology resources.The area  has a total size of 583 hectares. Map of the area's geographical location along with coordinate points is attached in this proclamation.
